_comment: Project-local override for /shipwright-compliance detective audit. Merges shallowly over the plugin _DEFAULT_CONFIG (audit_detector.py). Only keys present here override; everything else keeps plugin defaults. shipwright-webui is an adopted monorepo-style project with no plan-config splits, so conventional-commit scopes are cross-cutting component names rather than split slugs — the g2_stoplist below enumerates every scope in active use so G2 stops flagging them. Added 2026-05-15 as part of the Iterate K/M compliance-hygiene cleanup. 2026-06-12 (iterate-2026-06-12-compliance-reconcile-b7-g2): added 'actions' (custom-action feature, PR #123 feat(actions)) + 'review' (PR-review CI, PR #125 ci(review)) to reconcile G2 post-v0.18.0. 2026-06-12 (iterate-2026-06-12-compliance-bloat-g2-reconcile): added 'agent-docs' (agent-docs hygiene condense, PR #128 docs(agent-docs) commit 18cf09d). 2026-06-14 (iterate-2026-06-14-compliance-d3-g2-h1-reconcile): added 'responsive' (responsive tablet+phone views FR-01.38/FR-01.39, commits 74175ba/d30d8a7 feat(responsive)). 2026-06-29 (iterate-2026-06-29-compliance-b7-d3-g2-h2-reconcile): added 'mobile' (iOS focus-zoom + modal footer fix, PR #174 fix(mobile) commit f2fe10e) + 'images' (command-center board screenshot update, PR #173 docs(images) commit d9be7e7) to reconcile G2 post-v0.21.0. 2026-07-08 (iterate-2026-07-08-compliance-b7-d3-g2-h1-h2-reconcile): added 'projects' (project-delete cascade, PR #200 fix(projects) commit ff077d6), 'conventions' (create-dialog More-options convention, PR #199 docs(conventions) commit 79b475a), 'external' (collapse create-dialog More options, PR #198 feat(external) commit 80ab31f), and 'launch' (strip paste-artifact quotes, PR #195 fix(launch) commit 3499eac) to reconcile G2 post-v0.21.0; also added 'churn' (auto-generated 'chore(churn): regenerate derived snapshots after main merge' commits emitted by ensure_current.py whenever an iterate integrates a base advance — recurring, not tied to a single PR). 2026-07-21 (iterate-2026-07-21-compliance-audit-reconcile): added the 18 scopes the A-series WOW campaign and the Mission work introduced without appending them here — 'mission', 'ui', 'traceability', 'design', 'appearance', 'chrome', 'theme', 'motion', 'command', 'inbox', 'shipslog', 'design-gate', 'files-terminal', 'bootstrapper', 'runs', 'visual', 'modals', 'create-dialog' (taken verbatim from the G2 evidence of the audit run that flagged them, not hand-collected; per-scope counts are deliberately NOT recorded here — they go stale the moment another commit lands). Root cause of the lapse: an autonomous campaign merges its own sub-iterate PRs, so no single author passed through the rule below — if a campaign introduces a new component scope, its finalize step is where this list must grow. Also added 'transcript' (PR #313 perf(transcript), commit e96274fe), which landed on origin/main WHILE this reconciliation was in flight and broke the same rule one day after it was restated — caught by internal review, which noted G2 would otherwise have gone red again the moment this branch rebased. New conventional-commit scopes must be appended here in the same PR that introduces them.
_a5_phase_b_comment: A5.6 dormant-trigger opt-in. security.yml + codeql.yml were deliberately moved to Phase B (active pull_request + weekly schedule) in commit 7196205 (codeql d66ab55). This flag tells the compliance audit the activation is intentional, so A5.6's 'non-dormant trigger active' sub-case PASSES instead of emitting a permanent LOW false-positive. The structural guards (workflow_dispatch presence, bare-'on:' failure) still fire — narrower than disabled_checks:[A5.6]. Producer fix: shipwright PR #164 (a5_phase_b_activated). Accepted-meanwhile decision-drop: iterate-2026-06-07-a5-6-dormant-accepted.
_c1_open_comment: C1 (Spec FR -> plan/design coverage) is KNOWINGLY LEFT FAILING. Do NOT add it to disabled_checks - that is the exact wrong fix and this note is the fence. C1 is a DESIGN-PHASE verifier (check_design_fr_coverage in shared/scripts/tools/verifiers/design_checks.py) demanding .shipwright/designs/design-manifest.md, which /shipwright-design produces. This project never ran that phase - it was adopted; run_config completed_steps is [project, plan, build, test] and .shipwright/designs/ holds only visual-guidelines.md. The check passed for months as 'no planning FRs - coverage trivially satisfied', but on a WRONG basis: the FR table existed all along and the older spec parser did not recognise the adopted table shape. Measured with today's parser against the historical specs: 2026-05-20 -> 32 FRs, 2026-05-22 -> 32, 2026-06-30 -> 42, while every audit of those dates reported 'no planning FRs'. A plugin parser upgrade flipped it to HIGH-fail with zero change to this project, so it reports a real gap in the VERIFIER, not a regression here. The verifier already has the right shape of skip for a neighbouring case (_is_no_ui_scope -> scope=library) and needs the equivalent for 'no design phase ran'. Producer fix filed upstream in the shipwright monorepo as triage trg-d26da6f4 (2026-07-21, iterate-2026-07-21-compliance-audit-reconcile). Writing the manifest here was considered and DEFERRED by decision: an FR->screen map is product documentation worth doing deliberately, not padding on a records-cleanup PR. Re-review when the upstream skip lands, or if this project decides it wants the map for its own sake.
